'''âzh-h-h-f''' ('''kazhahhefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voicespond|voicespond]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voicespond|voicespond]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-h-h-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazhahhefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhahefoko|thizhahefoko]] || [[word:jizhahefoko|jizhahefoko]] || [[word:shizhahefoko|shizhahefoko]] || [[word:kizhahefoko|kizhahefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhahefoko|thuthuzhahefoko]] || [[word:jujuzhahefoko|jujuzhahefoko]] || [[word:shushuzhahefoko|shushuzhahefoko]] || [[word:kukuzhahefoko|kukuzhahefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhahefoko|thozhahefoko]] || [[word:jozhahefoko|jozhahefoko]] || [[word:shozhahefoko|shozhahefoko]] || [[word:kozhahefoko|kozhahefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhahefoko|thĂŠzhahefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhahefoko|jĂŠzhahefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhahefoko|shĂŠzhahefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhahefoko|kĂŠzhahefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhahefoko|thazhahefoko]] || [[word:jazhahefoko|jazhahefoko]] || [[word:shazhahefoko|shazhahefoko]] || [[word:kazhahefoko|kazhahefoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazhahefithi|shazhahefithi]] || [[word:shazhahefiji|shazhahefiji]] || [[word:shazhahefishi|shazhahefishi]] || [[word:shazhahefiki|shazhahefiki]]
